scores.name: hardship_handling
scores.reason: Agent 2 acknowledged the borrower's hardship (unemployment) and noted it for hardship review, but did not initiate the hardship review process before discussing payment options.

scores.name: policy_safe_resolution
scores.reason: Agent 2 correctly stated that no approved payment plan or reduced-closure terms could be confirmed in the chat, adhering to policy. However, the lack of a clear next step for hardship review detracted from the score.

scores.name: required_disclosures_and_identity
scores.reason: Agent 1 properly disclosed identity and recording at the start of the conversation, and Agent 2 did not repeat this unnecessarily.

scores.name: stop_contact_and_non_harassment
scores.reason: The agents respected the borrower's request to avoid back-and-forth on account details and acknowledged the stop-contact flag.

scores.name: handoff_execution
scores.reason: While Agent 1 did not fully complete the assessment by verifying identity through account details, Agent 2 did not re-verify identity but still needed to address the hardship review more directly.
